label: http api • response_format json_schema returns a typed 400 pointing at json_object
query: Give me a JSON object describing a cat.
notes: The documented response_format contract: json_schema is unsupported and must be rejected with a 400 whose error text steers the client to 'json_object' (the supported JSON mode) — never silently ignored, never a 500. Deterministic, rejected pre-generation.
